metadata.name: Kio dummy database seed from legacy PDF outputs
metadata.note: Demo data derived from uploaded legacy PDFs and normalized for product prototyping. Not for clinical use.

cases.case_title: Visual MRI dementia protocol - hippocampal atrophy pattern
Single-time AI volumetry - temporal/hippocampal low percentile
Longitudinal volumetry and corticometry - two timepoint analysis

reports.title: Brain MRI with Dementia Protocol
reports.clinical_summary: Visual dementia protocol with GCA, Koedam, MTA, Fazekas scores and hippocampal volume references. Advanced bilateral hippocampal atrophy noted in the legacy text; platform must present as imaging decision support, not final diagnosis.

reports.title: Brain Structure Volumes
reports.clinical_summary: Single-time volumetry with ICV/CSF/brain volumes, left/right/total structure volumes, percentiles, centile curves, and 3D percentile map.

reports.title: Longitudinal Brain Volumetry
reports.clinical_summary: Two-timepoint volumetry comparing 2024-11-02 with 2024-08-29 across total, left, and right structures, including percentiles, change percentages, centile curves, and 3D percentile spectrum map.

reports.title: Longitudinal Brain Corticometry
reports.clinical_summary: Two-timepoint cortical thickness analysis comparing total, left, and right thickness values with percentiles and change percentages.

report_modules.product_promise: Convert the old narrative MRI dementia report into a structured visual MRI workspace with scores, evidence, and sign-off gates.
report_modules.patient_visibility: Only physician-approved safe summary; no raw score tables by default.

report_modules.product_promise: Replace one-page PDF volumetry with interactive structure table, outlier filters, age percentile context, and clinically relevant summary cards.
Make the 21-page longitudinal report navigable through tabs, filters, trend cards, and bookmarked key biomarkers.
report_modules.patient_visibility: Only approved trend explanation; no raw segmentation or full percentile table.

report_modules.product_promise: Turn cortical thickness tables and curves into an interactive corticometry review module linked to volumetry.
report_modules.patient_visibility: Only approved summary of change and follow-up context.

visual_scores.name: Global Cortical Atrophy Score
visual_scores.interpretation: Sulci dilation; within age-normal table but clinically relevant in context

visual_scores.name: Medial Temporal Atrophy Score
visual_scores.interpretation: Decreased hippocampal height with choroid fissure and temporal horn dilation

visual_scores.name: Fazekas Score
visual_scores.interpretation: Early confluent high signal foci with infratentorial/pons involvement

findings.finding: Advanced bilateral hippocampal atrophy for age is described in the legacy report.
Fazekas score 2 with early confluent high signal foci and infratentorial/pons involvement.
No evidence of microbleeding or lacunar infarction reported.
Hippocampus total percentile 1.01; right hippocampus percentile 0.29; temporal total percentile 3.51.
Volumetry contains very low hippocampal and parietal percentiles and high ventricular/WMH percentiles; segmentation QC should be confirmed before clinical release.
Corticometry contains low right frontal and superior frontal percentiles plus cortical thickness changes; must remain decision support until reviewed.

tasks.title: Review radiologist-signed visual dementia report and publish final patient-safe summary
Validate AI volumetry outliers and sign imaging handoff
Confirm segmentation QC for longitudinal volumetry and corticometry
Assess de-identified research eligibility after clinical workflow completion

audit_events.details: Imported visual MRI dementia protocol PDF into structured case.
Imported single-time volumetry PDF into structured case.
Imported longitudinal volumetry and corticometry PDFs into one patient case.
